body:
### Summary

This is an idea that started from: https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/39#issuecomment-2340451014. Maybe it would make sense to create deprecated props for all the APIs that are different from Radix Primitives, making the migration super smooth. The deprecated prop would be prioritized to cover the pain from #1239.

The main counterargument is that it will slow us down, so maybe it's something that we should only do later on.

_(I could see doing the same with the MUI Base API & Material UI API.)_

### User inputs:

- "AI isn't adapted to the new render={} vs asChild" https://x.com/orcdev/status/2012101165505298689
- "base UI as radix ui is less maintained, but llm can misuse render props with as child" 
https://x.com/wang_zuo/status/2012090551949295952

comments.body: We haven't seen any community interest in it. This would be pretty cumbersome anyway, as our components have different parts.

I have added a new data point from @OrcDev to the potential purpose:

> I've used shadcn with Base UI on a couple of projects now, and in my opinion it's not ready yet, for a few reasons:
[...]
> - AI isn't adapted to the new render={} vs asChild

https://x.com/orcdev/status/2012101165505298689. AI training dataset is what it is.
I'm afraid if we add Radix API, AI will keep using it instead of learning the Base UI way.

I would hope that models providers would have hard coded rules for deprecated API, but true.

This https://x.com/olivtassinari/status/2012903981945696576 make me hopeful that it's only a matter of "when", not "if". But training cut off dates are usually 12 months+ so it might take a lonnnng time.

labels.name: scope: all components
labels.description: Widespread work has an impact on almost all components.

title: [discussion] Create deprecated props to ease Radix Primitives migration?
